---
title: "Lab 1 Notes"
author: Jose Toledo Luna
toc: false
date: today
---

## Learning Objectives

- Develop basic R programming skills (e.g., creating vectors, performing operations, installing and using packages) 
 ￼
- Apply fundamental statistical functions such as mean, median, minimum, maximum, and standard deviation  ￼

## Notes

We will use the following notes to cover material for Lab 1

1. [Fundamentals of R](https://ucla-stats13.netlify.app/notes/01-fundamentals)
2. [Importing Data in R](https://ucla-stats13.netlify.app/notes/02-importing_data)

<!-- 3. [Summarizing Numerical Data](https://ucla-stats13.netlify.app/notes/03-intro_numerical_variables)
4. [Summarizing Categorical Data](https://ucla-stats13.netlify.app/notes/04-intro_categorical_variables) -->
